source_meta.source_document: VA-LCP Proximal Tibial Plate 3.5 Surgical Technique

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official DePuy Synthes technique and catalog materials describe dedicated proximal tibia plating instrumentation for tibial plateau fixation.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official technique and inventory materials describe the proximal tibia plate family used for tibial plateau fixation.
Official inventory control materials describe compatible locking screw fixation for the proximal tibia plate family.
Official technique materials describe dedicated instrumentation and drill-guide workflow for proximal tibia plate application.

row.system_notes: Proximal tibial plateau locking plate system within the DePuy Synthes trauma portfolio, including variable-angle proximal tibia fixation.
